name: Simplified Filing for One-Participant Plans

eligibility.description: Plan must cover only the owner (and spouse) or partners (and spouses), meet minimum coverage without being combined with other plans, and have assets ≤ $250,000.

description: Relieves one-participant retirement plans (and those covering only a couple or partners) from filing an annual return if total plan assets are $250,000 or less at the end of the plan year.
